titleStmt.title: SII 18.161: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 161. (B.K. No. 137 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription dated in Śaka 1106 and in the 3rd year of the reign of Tribhuvanāmallā Vīra-Sōmēśvara, Krōdhi, Kārtika, Monday, solar eclipse corresponding regularly to A.D. 1184, November 5, Monday. This date takes back the beginning of the reign of Sōmēs11vara to A.D. 1182.

It refers to the installation of an image of a god (name lost) and to certain grants made to that temple by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara. Hemmāḍidēvarasa of the Yādava family in the 10th year of the reign of [Jagadēkama]lladēva, Prabhava, Phālguṇa śu. Panchami, Sunday. The cyclic year Prabhva coincides with the 10th year of Jagadēkamalla II and in his reign the details correspond to A.D. 1148, February 25, Wednesday, f.d.t. ·02. In the next year, i.e., Vibhava, however, the given details correspond regularly to A.D. 1149, February 13, Sunday, f.d.t. ·65.
It records a grant of land to some god (name lost) made by Gōmadēva and Mahāpradhāna Bammidēva.
The record is broken on the right side.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .
maṇi yādavagōtrōdayadēvīdharadinapaṁ yādava kuḷābdhicaṁdraṁ
manu . koṁḍiṟivagōmadhātrīmaṁḍaḷapati taṁdeyanniyudu
ya caṁḍabhujaṁ nāgayanūrjjitadharmma . kramadiṁ tattanu jāta cidda
ṇaṁ taṁnripasūnu toṁḍamarasaṁ taṁnandanaṁ gōmabhūra maṇīśaṁ tava
samadārātikritāntanuddhatabaḷaṁ śrīgōmabhūpāḷakaṁ . svasti śrīmatu
lladēvavarṣada 10 neya prabhavasaṁvatsarada phālguṇa sudda paṁcami [Ādi]tyavāra U
. svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabdamahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ dvārāvatīpurava
ṇaṁ śrīmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ hemmāḍidēvarasaru śrī matu varamūrtti
rttadalu pratiṣṭeyamāḍi tammanvāyake banda kula brahmapuri surigeya nāka
ḍiya stānamaṁ koṭṭire yādēvara naivēdyakke nāgara baṭṭiṁ haḍavalu ḍoḍḍakōḍi
yāgi koṁḍiṟiva gōmana gaḍiṁba gēṇa gaḷeyalu mattaru yippattanālku
mattaru 2 kaṇamaṁḍaḷadoḷage brahmapurigēriyalu 24 kayya maneya
yādavakuḷasarasijaravi yādavakuḷavaramūrtti caṁdranenalu yādavakula
kēsavadēvaṁ © Ātana taṁmaṁ bhuvanavikhyātaparākrama naśēśapaṭu subhaṭa
bhūtaḷapati vīragōma neṁdaḍe vīragōma driṣṭa
guṁ payōnidhigaḷēḷuṁ mēreyaṁ dāṇṭuguṁ keḍargguṁ dhātrige caṁdranuṁ ra
nalkoḍeguṁ dikupatisaṁkuḷaṁ naḍuguguṁ digudantigaḷu magguguṁ . paravadhu va
ḍōḍadadeṁdaḍe cittaṁ surasiṁdhujanoḷu naranoḷu doreyennidanalte vīragōmanripāḷa
ntaṁ budhapratatigaṁ vadhūsaṁtatigaṁ ntene vīragōme yanantakanamara
vāravanitākāmaṁgaticaturasarasasatkavinikaraprēmaṁge samaradaśaratharāmaṁ
yoḷu . kuḍuteyoḷomme koṁḍu kuḍiyalu kaḍugujja nenippagastyanokkuḍute
noḷaṇnanadane pōliparkkaḍu jaḍareṁdu dhikkarisutirppudu vārddhiya guṇpanoḷva
bdhiya guṇpumahītaḷāgradoḻu © negaḷdī vaṇadaṇḍanāthaṁ śacigaṁ śrīkāḷalādēvigaṁ
kandarenuvantēṁ puṭṭuvolu puṭṭire mige viṣyēśvaraṁ kūrtta rakṣisali śrīgaṇḍapeReadśvē.
re ba(ṁ)mmidēva ninagi(ṁ)nnārāmparī dhātriyoḻu . ghaṭe ghaṭe Oṁdanoṁdu sale mūdali
ṣṇeyaṁ paṭuvenisirdda vīrabhaṭaruṁ kalisiṁhaṇacakravartti kammaṭanavola(ṁ)nteyayvaḷisutaṁ caladaṁ
kaṭakavanonde mukkinoḷe geldadaṭaṁ kaliba(ṁ)mmidēvanu . puruṣākāradinīva kalpataru martyākāradiṁdī
maṇi mānavākritiyinīvutippa vidyādharaṁ nararūpiṁ doledīva dēvanenutaṁ vaṁdibrajaṁ baṁ
nade rāyanadhanarggiṣṭārtthamaṁkoṭṭapanu . © sakavarṣa 1106 salalu . svasti śrī
kyacakravartti tribhavanamallavīrasōmē svaradēvavarṣada 3 neya krōdhisaṁvatsarada kārttika
sōmavāra sūryagrahaṇanimittadiṁ cakravarttiyuṁ śrīmanmahā pradhānaṁ baṁ
ṇḍanāyakaruṁ svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ dvārāvatīpurava
nerevoḍegaṇḍa yādavanārāyaṇaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ vīra gōmadēvarasaru śrīśvayaṁbhu
yakadēvara Aṁgabhōga raṁgabhōga caitrapavitra khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnō ddhārakkeṁdu sarvva
vāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭagauvuḍageṟeya haḷḷi Ā haḷḷiya sīme mūḍalu matta
paḍuvaṇa holanu mēre teṁkalu Arasahaḷḷiya holanu mēre paḍuvalu honni haḷḷiya mūḍaṇa
galu piriyahaḷḷa mēre Iśānnyadalu naḍaviya haraḷu mēre yi(ṁ)ntinita ṟali kavileya kalu
Argghyatīrtta kurukṣētragaye gaṁgāsāgara vāraṇāsiyeṁba śiva tīrttagaḷalli
Ādivēda sahasra sākhegaḷanaṟiva kōṭi brāhmaṇarggaṁ Ekkōṭi tapōdhanarggaṁ kōṭi kavileya
dānaṁgaḷumaṁ koṭṭa phalamaṁ paḍevarī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavaru . I dhaṁrmma
brāhmaṇarumaṁ Ekkōṭi tapōdhanarumaṁ kōṭi kavileyaṁ gōḷiḍe koṁda
rdhamaṁguḷī harannarakamāpnōti yavadābhūta saṁplavaṁ .
viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi
Digital edition of SII 18.161 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
